description: Style Note Lightweight and soft, inner wear from chromozome epitomises comfort Fit and takes care of individual requirements with a lot of variety. Ensuring that you are relaxed inside and look good outside, these are stylish necessities that you shouldn't do without. Product Details Navy blue Urban briefs, soft elasticated waistband with branding on it, tagless comfort and double layering at the pouch Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm Do not iron on print Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size M The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.
